SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity

Class CollectedFossil

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.CollectedFossil
public class CollectedFossil extends Object
Entity class representing a fossil collected by a user. Links users to the fossils they have found during gameplay.

    Description

    Gets the foreign key reference to the user who collected this fossil.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public long getId()
      Gets the primary key identifier for this collected fossil.
      Returns:
      Collected fossil ID.

    • setId

      public void setId(long id)
      Sets the primary key identifier for this collected fossil.
      Parameters:
      id - Collected fossil ID.

    • getFossilStatsId

      @Nullable public Long getFossilStatsId()
      Gets the foreign key reference to the fossil type.
      Returns:
      Fossil ID, or null if not yet determined.

    • setFossilStatsId

      public void setFossilStatsId(@Nullable Long fossilStatsId)
      Sets the foreign key reference to the fossil type.
      Parameters:
      fossilStatsId - Fossil ID.

    • getCollectingUser

      public long getCollectingUser()
      Gets the foreign key reference to the user who collected this fossil.
      Returns:
      User ID.

    • setCollectingUser

      public void setCollectingUser(long collectingUser)
      Sets the foreign key reference to the user who collected this fossil.
      Parameters:
      collectingUser - User ID.

    • isFavorite

      public boolean isFavorite()
      Gets whether this fossil is marked as a favorite by the user.
      Returns:
      true if favorite, false otherwise.

    • setFavorite

      public void setFavorite(boolean favorite)
      Sets whether this fossil is marked as a favorite by the user.
      Parameters:
      favorite - true if favorite, false otherwise.

    • getDateTimeCollected

      @NonNull public Instant getDateTimeCollected()
      Gets the timestamp when this fossil was collected.
      Returns:
      Date and time collected.

    • setDateTimeCollected

      public void setDateTimeCollected(@NonNull Instant dateTimeCollected)
      Sets the timestamp when this fossil was collected.
      Parameters:
      dateTimeCollected - Date and time collected.
